title: sagina × micrantha
intro: Sagina × micrantha, also known as lesser meadow-rue, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of lesser meadow-rue include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve for various herbal applications, and its essential oil is often used in aromatherapy.
